data.label: libuv
data.description: libuv 是一个多平台支持库，重点关注异步 I/O。它最初主要为 Node.js 使用而开发，但也被 Luvit、Julia、uvloop 等项目使用。

data.label: libuv
data.description: libuv is a multi-platform support library with a focus on asynchronous I/O. It was primarily developed for use by Node.js, but it's also used by Luvit, Julia, uvloop, and others.
